description: The Excel sjövatten sheet uses a virtual residual meter "BPS_V2" (= B342 total inlet − 15 direct consumers) that is fractionally distributed to four buildings: B301 @ 0.09, B302 @ 0.18, B303 @ 0.18, B307 @ 0.46 (total 0.91). The remaining 0.09 is unattributed in Excel. Coefficients vary month-to-month in the live sheet's hidden R-column. views.sql does not yet support fractional-subtract primitives, so B301/B302/B303/B307 under-count in topology vs Excel. Jan-2026 residuals: B301 −540, B302 −1081, B303 −1081, B307 −2761 kWh. Feb-2026 residuals scale with load: B301 −2685, B302/B303 −5369 each, B307 −13721 kWh. Permanent until a weighted- subtract primitive exists.

B304-52-V2-AW026 is a manually-read STRUX meter with no Snowflake equivalent. Excel caches the meter's monthly value; ontology reads zero. B304 therefore under-counts by the STRUX cached value each month (−29640 Jan-2026, −43483 Feb-2026). Per project convention, STRUX-only meters are never synthesized as Snowflake rows.

Counter went offline 2025-08-05 at value 335549.97 and resumed with a device swap on 2025-11-30 at value 364454.09. Combined pattern covered by 2-segment split :d.A | :d.B via rolling_sum. The ~4-month gap is flat-carried; if B334 has upstream data or siblings that capture the physical flow, an interpolate patch could recover the integral. Outside Jan/Feb 2026 reference period so no facit impact.
Device swap 2025-02-17 (last value 758607.50). Outside Jan/Feb 2026 reference period.
Counter went offline 2026-02-20 at value 9471341.0. Inside Feb 2026 reference period — affects last 8 days of the month.
Counter went offline 2025-10-18 at value 6.60 (essentially zero before offline too). Outside Jan/Feb 2026.
